description: Fired when a user clicks play on an audio track (or resumes after pause). Captures the track id, title, and author.
Fired when a user clicks the download button on an audio card. Captures the track id, title, and author.
Fired when a user clicks the WhatsApp share button on an audio card. Captures the track id, title, and author.
Fired when a user performs a search in the lecture list. Captures the search query.
Fired when a user switches between local/international region filters. Captures the selected region.
Fired when a user views an audio detail page (top of conversion funnel). Captures the slug, title, and author.
Fired when a user views an article detail page (top of conversion funnel). Captures the slug and title.
Server-side event fired when a download request is processed via the API route. Captures the file URL.
